findings.evidence: MAX_DISCOUNT_RATE changed from 0.20 to 0.30; clamp logic is structurally unchanged and correctly uses the constant, so the new cap propagates automatically to all three functions.
test_over_cap_clamped updated to 0.30 (matches new cap); new test_new_cap_boundary_allowed correctly asserts clamp(0.30)==0.30 since 0.30 is not strictly greater than MAX_DISCOUNT_RATE.
test_apply_over_cap_uses_cap updated: 100*(1-0.30)=70.00 is correct; test_apply_at_new_cap also expects 70.0 which is correct.
test_savings_over_cap_uses_cap updated: 100*0.30=30.00 is correct; test_savings_at_new_cap also expects 30.0 which is correct.
